chosen_action.title: Execution board directory follow-through guard repair

why_this_action.summary: The execution board was stale: it still surfaced the SaaSHub directory secondary-surface repair as a do-now asset even though that email follow-through already shipped on 2026-05-25 and remains inside its review window.

targets_prepared_after_regen: Ralph Workflow curator follow-up — Codeberg CTA

result.effect: The board now suppresses already-shipped directory secondary-surface follow-through during its active review window and points the loop at the remaining truthful assets instead of requeueing fake progress.
